title: BrownieJS | A 9 kB React map library with zero dependencies
description: A 9 kB React map library with zero dependencies. Tiles, markers, routes, and clustering — no Leaflet or Mapbox required.

footer.credit: In memory of Brownie (2024–2025), a little explorer with the biggest heart
